title: Curious about Round Robin feature by Excellent Teams
excerpt: Is anyone using the Round Robin add-on in Marketplace from Excellent Teams?  It only has a little over 100 downloads and I am looking for feedback.

posts.author: kellyjamespro (Kelly James)
